eventhub_name.description: The name of the Event Hub for which the authorization rule is being created.

listen.description: A boolean value that indicates if the rule should have listen permissions, allowing it to read messages from the Event Hub.

manage.description: A boolean value that indicates if the rule should have manage permissions, allowing it to manage the Event Hub (e.g., update properties).

name.description: The name of the authorization rule being created.

namespace_name.description: The name of the Event Hub namespace in which the Event Hub exists.

send.description: A boolean value that indicates if the rule should have send permissions, allowing it to send messages to the Event Hub.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
